🔗 공유 링크
이 링크로 광고주가 직접 노선을 확인할 수 있습니다.

차량 데이터
노선별 차량 현황 · 번호판/운수회사 클릭 수정

🚌 광고 가용 버스 목록
🔍
계약 등록
새 광고 계약을 등록합니다
노선 검색 후 버스 수량 입력 → 번호판 칸이 자동 생성됩니다
🔗 구글 시트 연결
📋 연결 방법
1. 구글 스프레드시트 생성 → 공유(편집자)
2. URL에서 시트 ID 복사
3. Apps Script 웹앱 배포 후 URL 입력
✅ 스프레드시트 ID가 이미 설정되어 있습니다.
1a5An0H6j6ppFIPosa5Q8kYQe-tjQj6MLpXjULq0UlcI
2단계 배포 후 생성되는 URL을 입력하세요
a.id===id)||{name:'미상',contact:''};} function getRoute(id){return DB.routes.find(r=>r.id===id)||{no:'?',type:'',start:'',end:''};} function activeContracts(){return DB.contracts.filter(c=>c.status==='진행중');} function refreshAll(){renderKPI();renderRouteBars();renderExpiringList();renderAdvGrid();renderAdvTable();renderRouteTable();renderContractTable();if(document.getElementById('page-archived')?.classList.contains('active'))renderArchived();} function renderKPI(){ const total=DB.routes.reduce((s,r)=>s+r.buses,0); const active=activeContracts().length; const free=total-active; const expiring=activeContracts().filter(c=>{const d=getDaysLeft(c.end);return d>=0&&d<=30;}).length; const rate=total?Math.round(active/total*100):0; document.getElementById('kpi-total').innerHTML=`${total}대`; document.getElementById('kpi-active').innerHTML=`${active}대`; document.getElementById('kpi-free').innerHTML=`${free}대`; document.getElementById('kpi-expiring').innerHTML=`${expiring}건`; document.getElementById('kpi-active-rate').textContent=`점유율 ${rate}%`; document.getElementById('kpi-free-sub').textContent=`전체의 ${total?Math.round(free/total*100):0}% 가용`; document.getElementById('kpi-expiring-sub').textContent=expiring>0?'즉시 확인 필요':'이달 만료 없음'; document.getElementById('kpi-active-bar').style.width=rate+'%'; document.getElementById('kpi-free-bar').style.width=(total?Math.round(free/total*100):0)+'%'; document.getElementById('kpi-expiring-bar').style.width=Math.min(expiring*5,100)+'%'; // 게첨율 히어로 배너 업데이트 const occRate = document.getElementById('occ-rate'); const occBar = document.getElementById('occ-bar'); const occDetail = document.getElementById('occ-detail'); const occStatus = document.getElementById('occ-status'); if (occRate) { occRate.textContent = rate; if (occBar) { // 짧은 딜레이 후 애니메이션 setTimeout(() => { occBar.style.width = rate + '%'; }, 80); } if (occDetail) occDetail.textContent = active + '대 광고중 / 전체 ' + total + '대'; if (occStatus) { const statusTxt = rate >= 90 ? '🔥 거의 만석' : rate >= 75 ? '✅ 양호' : rate >= 50 ? '📈 진행중' : '📉 여유 있음'; occStatus.textContent = statusTxt; } } } function renderRouteBars(){ const el=document.getElementById('route-bars'); if(!DB.routes.length){el.innerHTML='
📭
데이터 없음
';return;} el.innerHTML=[...DB.routes].sort((a,b)=>b.buses-a.buses).slice(0,8).map(r=>{ const used=activeContracts().filter(c=>c.routeId===r.id).length; const pct=r.buses?Math.round(used/r.buses*100):0; const tb=r.type==='급행'?'badge-red':r.type==='간선'?'badge-blue':'badge-green'; return `
${r.id}${r.start}→${r.end}
${used}/${r.buses}대(${pct}%)
`; }).join(''); } function renderExpiringList(){ const list=activeContracts().map(c=>({...c,daysLeft:getDaysLeft(c.end)})).filter(c=>c.daysLeft>=0&&c.daysLeft<=30).sort((a,b)=>a.daysLeft-b.daysLeft); document.getElementById('expiring-count-badge').textContent=list.length+'건'; const el=document.getElementById('expiring-list'); if(!list.length){el.innerHTML='
✅
30일 내 만료 없음
';return;} el.innerHTML=list.slice(0,8).map(c=>{ const cls=c.daysLeft<=7?'dday-critical':c.daysLeft<=15?'dday-warning':'dday-safe'; const adv=getAdv(c.advId); const rt=getRoute(c.routeId); return `
D-${c.daysLeft}
${adv.name}
${c.plate}·${rt.id}번·${fmtDate(c.end)}종료
→
`; }).join('')+'
전체 보기 →
'; } function renderAdvGrid(){ const el=document.getElementById('adv-grid'); if(!DB.advertisers.length){el.innerHTML='
📭 광고주 없음
';return;} el.innerHTML=DB.advertisers.map(a=>{ const contracts=activeContracts().filter(c=>c.advId===a.id); const routes=[...new Set(contracts.map(c=>getRoute(c.routeId).id).filter(Boolean))]; const expiring=contracts.filter(c=>getDaysLeft(c.end)<=30).length; return `
${a.name}
${contracts.length}
버스
${routes.length}
노선
${expiring}
임박
${routes.map(r=>`${r}번`).join('')}
`; }).join(''); } function openAdvModal(advId){ const adv=getAdv(advId); const contracts=activeContracts().filter(c=>c.advId===advId); const allContracts=DB.contracts.filter(c=>c.advId===advId); const routes=[...new Set(contracts.map(c=>getRoute(c.routeId).id).filter(Boolean))]; document.getElementById('modal-title').innerHTML = adv.name + ''; document.getElementById('modal-body').innerHTML=`
${contracts.length}
진행중 버스
${routes.length}
이용 노선
${contracts.filter(c=>getDaysLeft(c.end)<=30).length}
만료 임박
진행중인 노선
${routes.length?routes.map(r=>`${r}번`).join(''):'없음'}
진행중 계약 (${contracts.length}건)
${contracts.map(c=>{const rt=getRoute(c.routeId);const dl=getDaysLeft(c.end);const cls=dl<=7?'badge-red':dl<=30?'badge-orange':'badge-green';return`
${c.plate}D-${dl}
${fmtDate(c.start)}~${fmtDate(c.end)}
${rt.id}번${c.product}
`;}).join('')||'
없음
'}
전체 계약 이력 (${allContracts.length}건)
${allContracts.map(c=>{const rt=getRoute(c.routeId);const isPast=new Date(c.end)`;}).join('')}
번호판노선기간상태
${c.plate}${rt.id}번${fmtDate(c.start)}~${fmtDate(c.end)}${isPast?'종료':'진행중'}
`; document.getElementById('modal-overlay').classList.add('open'); } function renderAdvTable(){ document.getElementById('adv-table-body').innerHTML=DB.advertisers.map(a=>{ const contracts=activeContracts().filter(c=>c.advId===a.id); const routes=[...new Set(contracts.map(c=>getRoute(c.routeId).id).filter(Boolean))]; const lastC=DB.contracts.filter(c=>c.advId===a.id).sort((a,b)=>b.start.localeCompare(a.start))[0]; return`${a.name}${a.contact}${contracts.length}건${contracts.length}대${routes.map(r=>`${r}번`).join(' ')}${lastC?fmtDate(lastC.start):'—'}`; }).join(''); } function renderRouteTable(){ document.getElementById('route-table-body').innerHTML=DB.routes.map(r=>{ const used=activeContracts().filter(c=>c.routeId===r.id).length; const free=r.buses-used; const pct=r.buses?Math.round(used/r.buses*100):0; const tb=r.type==='급행'?'badge-red':r.type==='간선'?'badge-blue':'badge-green'; return`${r.id}${r.type}${r.start}→${r.end}${r.buses}${used}${free}
${pct}%
`; }).join(''); } let ctStatusFilter = 'all'; function setCTFilter(btn, val) { ctStatusFilter = val; document.querySelectorAll('.ct-status-btn').forEach(function(b) { var on = b.dataset.v === val; b.classList.toggle('active', on); b.style.background = on ? 'var(--accent)' : ''; b.style.color = on ? '#fff' : ''; b.style.borderColor = on ? 'var(--accent)' : ''; }); renderContractTable(); } function makePlateTagHtml(c) { var cid = String(c.id || '').replace(/['"]/g, ''); var plate = String(c.plate|| '(미입력)').replace(/['"<>&]/g, function(ch) { if (ch === '"') return '"'; if (ch === "'") return '''; if (ch === '<') return '<'; if (ch === '>') return '>'; return '&'; }); var displayPlate = c.plate || '(미입력)'; var h = ''; h += ''; h += ''; row += ''; return row; }).join(''); var card = ''; card += '
'; // 헤더 card += '
'; card += '

노선

D-' + dl + '
'; card += '
최근만료
'; card += '
'; card += '
' + fmtDate(earliest) + '
'; card += '
~ ' + fmtDate(latest) + '
'; card += ''; card += '▾'; card += '
'; // 테이블 card += '

노선버스번호판 더블클릭:수정 · ×:삭제시작일종료일잔여
'; return card; }).join(''); } function toggleCtDetail(id, header) { const el = document.getElementById(id); if (!el) return; const open = el.style.display !== 'none'; el.style.display = open ? 'none' : 'block'; const ch = header.querySelector('.ct-chevron'); if (ch) ch.textContent = open ? '▾' : '▴'; } // 일괄 수정 (같은 광고주+노선+기간 묶음) function openContractsBatchEdit(advId, routeId, startDate, endDate) { // 해당 광고주+노선의 모든 계약 찾기 (기간 무관 - 노선 단위로 묶어서 수정) var batchContracts = DB.contracts.filter(function(c) { return c.advId === advId && c.routeId === routeId; }); if (!batchContracts.length) return; var overlay = document.getElementById('contract-form-overlay'); overlay.style.display = 'flex'; cfRouteCounter = 0; document.getElementById('cf-routes-container').innerHTML = ''; document.getElementById('cf-summary').style.display = 'none'; // 배치 수정 모드 세팅 document.getElementById('cf-title').textContent = '계약 수정'; var rt = getRoute(routeId); var adv = getAdv(advId); document.getElementById('cf-sub').textContent = adv.name + ' · ' + (rt.id||routeId) + '번 · ' + batchContracts.length + '대 일괄 수정'; // 단건 ID 비움 → 배치 모드 구분 document.getElementById('cf-id').value = ''; document.getElementById('cf-batch-ids').value = batchContracts.map(function(c){return c.id;}).join(','); // 광고주 프리필 document.getElementById('cf-adv-id').value = advId; document.getElementById('cf-adv-input').value = adv.name; // 광고 종류 (첫 번째 계약 기준) document.getElementById('cf-product').value = batchContracts[0].product || '후면 광고'; document.getElementById('cf-status').value = batchContracts[0].status || '진행중'; document.getElementById('cf-memo').value = batchContracts[0].memo || ''; // 기간: 가장 이른 시작 ~ 가장 늦은 종료 var starts = batchContracts.map(function(c){return c.start;}).sort(); var ends = batchContracts.map(function(c){return c.end;}).sort(); document.getElementById('cf-start').value = starts[0]; document.getElementById('cf-end').value = ends[ends.length-1]; // 노선 행 추가 + 번호판 복원 var plates = batchContracts.map(function(c){return c.plate||'';}); addRouteRow(routeId, batchContracts.length, plates); document.getElementById('cf-submit-btn').textContent = '💾 일괄 수정 저장'; setTimeout(function(){ document.getElementById('cf-adv-input').focus(); }, 120); } function deleteAdvAllContracts(advId, advName) { var cnt = DB.contracts.filter(function(c){ return c.advId === advId; }).length; if (!cnt) { showToast('삭제할 계약이 없습니다.', 'red'); return; } if (!confirm('[' + advName + '] 계약 ' + cnt + '건을 모두 삭제하시겠습니까?')) return; DB.contracts = DB.contracts.filter(function(c){ return c.advId !== advId; }); refreshAll(); showToast('[' + advName + '] 계약 ' + cnt + '건 삭제 완료', 'red'); } // 일괄 삭제 function deleteBatchContracts(ids) { if (!confirm(`${ids.length}건의 계약을 모두 삭제하시겠습니까?`)) return; DB.contracts = DB.contracts.filter(c => !ids.includes(c.id)); refreshAll(); showToast(`${ids.length}건 삭제되었습니다.`, 'red'); } // 단건 삭제 (기존 호환) function deleteContract(contractId) { deleteBatchContracts([contractId]); } function searchPlate(val){ const el=document.getElementById('plate-result'); if(!val.trim()){el.innerHTML='
🚌
번호판을 입력하세요
';return;} const contracts=DB.contracts.filter(c=>c.plate.includes(val.trim())); if(!contracts.length){el.innerHTML='
🔍
해당 번호판 계약 없음
';return;} const c=contracts[0];const adv=getAdv(c.advId);const rt=getRoute(c.routeId);const dl=getDaysLeft(c.end); const sc=dl<=7?'badge-red':dl<=30?'badge-orange':'badge-green'; el.innerHTML=`
${c.plate}
노선${rt.id}번 (${rt.start}→${rt.end})
광고주${adv.name} →
광고물${c.product}
계약기간${fmtDate(c.start)}~${fmtDate(c.end)}
상태D-${dl}
`; } // 노선 관리에서 지도로 이동 function showMapRoute(routeNo) { showPage('map'); setTimeout(()=>{ const route = ROUTES.find(r=>r.id===routeNo); if (route) mapHandleClick(routeNo); }, 300); } // 페이지 전환 function showPage(name) { document.querySelectorAll('.page-view').forEach(el=>el.classList.remove('active')); document.querySelectorAll('.nav-tab,.sidebar-item').forEach(el=>el.classList.remove('active')); const page = document.getElementById('page-'+name); if (page) page.classList.add('active'); document.querySelectorAll(`[onclick*="showPage('${name}')"]`).forEach(el=>el.classList.add('active')); if (name==='map') { setTimeout(()=>{ initMap(); if(olMap) olMap.updateSize(); },50); } if (name==='search') { document.getElementById('plate-input')?.focus(); } if (name==='archived') { setTimeout(()=>renderArchived(), 50); } if (name==='advmap') { setTimeout(()=>{ if(advMapInstance) advMapInstance.updateSize(); }, 80); } } function closeModal(e){if(!e||e.target===document.getElementById('modal-overlay'))document.getElementById('modal-overlay').classList.remove('open');} function openGsConfig(){const o=document.getElementById('gs-modal-overlay');o.style.display='flex';} function closeGsModal(e){if(!e||e.target===document.getElementById('gs-modal-overlay'))document.getElementById('gs-modal-overlay').style.display='none';} // ============================================================ // 광고주 전용 지도 (openAdvMapPage / closeAdvMap) // ============================================================ var advMapInstance = null; var advMapInitialized = false; var currentAdvMapId = null; // 색상 팔레트 (노선별) var ADV_COLORS = [ '#3A5BF0','#E8354A','#0DB972','#F07820','#7C4DFF', '#00BCD4','#FF6B35','#2ECC71','#E91E63','#FF9800' ]; function openAdvMapPage(advId) { // 모달 닫기 document.getElementById('modal-overlay').classList.remove('open'); currentAdvMapId = advId; var adv = getAdv(advId); var contracts = activeContracts().filter(function(c){ return c.advId === advId; }); // 노선별 집계 var byRoute = {}; contracts.forEach(function(c) { if (!c.routeId) return; if (!byRoute[c.routeId]) byRoute[c.routeId] = { count: 0, contracts: [] }; byRoute[c.routeId].count++; byRoute[c.routeId].contracts.push(c); }); var routeIds = Object.keys(byRoute); // 헤더 업데이트 document.getElementById('advmap-adv-name').textContent = adv.name; document.getElementById('advmap-adv-sub').textContent = '진행중 노선 ' + routeIds.length + '개 · ' + contracts.length + '대'; document.getElementById('advmap-stats').innerHTML = '' + contracts.length + ' 대 집행중
' + '' + routeIds.length + ' 개 노선'; // 노선 배지 var badgesEl = document.getElementById('advmap-route-badges'); badgesEl.innerHTML = routeIds.map(function(rid, i) { var rt = getRoute(rid); var color = ADV_COLORS[i % ADV_COLORS.length]; var tb = rt.type==='급행'?'#E8354A':rt.type==='간선'?'#3A5BF0':'#0DB972'; return '' + (rt.id||rid) + '번'; }).join(''); // 페이지 전환 showPage('advmap'); // 지도 초기화 (최초 1회) setTimeout(function() { if (!advMapInitialized) { initAdvMap(); } renderAdvMapRoutes(routeIds, byRoute); }, 100); } function initAdvMap() { advMapInitialized = true; var vworldKey = '212243F0-4084-334E-A51D-9D67F98759FB'; advMapInstance = new ol.Map({ target: 'advmap-ol', layers: [new ol.layer.Tile({ source: new ol.source.XYZ({ url: 'https://api.vworld.kr/req/wmts/1.0.0/' + vworldKey + '/Base/{z}/{y}/{x}.png', crossOrigin: 'anonymous' }) })] }); advMapInstance.getView().setCenter(ol.proj.fromLonLat([127.385, 36.351])); advMapInstance.getView().setZoom(12); // 호버 툴팁 advMapInstance.on('pointermove', function(e) { var f = advMapInstance.forEachFeatureAtPixel(e.pixel, function(f){ return f; }, {hitTolerance:6}); if (f && f.get('stopName')) { advMapInstance.getViewport().style.cursor = 'pointer'; advMapInstance.getViewport().title = f.get('stopName'); } else { advMapInstance.getViewport().style.cursor = ''; } }); } var advMapLayers = []; function renderAdvMapRoutes(routeIds, byRoute) { // 기존 레이어 제거 advMapLayers.forEach(function(l) { advMapInstance.removeLayer(l); }); advMapLayers = []; var legendEl = document.getElementById('advmap-legend'); legendEl.style.display = 'none'; legendEl.innerHTML = ''; if (!routeIds.length) return; var allCoords = []; var legendItems = []; routeIds.forEach(function(rid, i) { var color = ADV_COLORS[i % ADV_COLORS.length]; var routeData = ROUTES.find(function(r){ return r.id === rid; }); var busCount = byRoute[rid] ? byRoute[rid].count : 0; if (!routeData || !routeData.stops || routeData.stops.length < 2) return; var src = new ol.source.Vector(); var coords = routeData.stops.map(function(s) { return ol.proj.fromLonLat([s.lng, s.lat]); }); allCoords = allCoords.concat(coords); // 노선 선 var lineFeature = new ol.Feature({ geometry: new ol.geom.LineString(coords), routeId: rid }); lineFeature.setStyle(new ol.style.Style({ stroke: new ol.style.Stroke({ color: color, width: 5 }) })); src.addFeature(lineFeature); // 정류장 점 routeData.stops.forEach(function(s, si) { var isEnd = si === 0 || si === routeData.stops.length - 1; var f = new ol.Feature({ geometry: new ol.geom.Point(ol.proj.fromLonLat([s.lng, s.lat])), stopName: s.name, routeId: rid }); f.setStyle(new ol.style.Style({ image: new ol.style.Circle({ radius: isEnd ? 7 : 3, fill: new ol.style.Fill({ color: isEnd ? '#fff' : color }), stroke: new ol.style.Stroke({ color: isEnd ? color : '#fff', width: isEnd ? 2.5 : 1 }) }) })); src.addFeature(f); }); // 중간 지점에 버스 수량 라벨 박스 var midIdx = Math.floor(routeData.stops.length / 2); var midStop = routeData.stops[midIdx]; var labelFeature = new ol.Feature({ geometry: new ol.geom.Point(ol.proj.fromLonLat([midStop.lng, midStop.lat])), routeId: rid }); var rt = getRoute(rid); var labelText = (rt.id || rid) + '번\n' + busCount + '대'; labelFeature.setStyle(new ol.style.Style({ image: new ol.style.Icon({ anchor: [0.5, 1.6], anchorXUnits: 'fraction', anchorYUnits: 'fraction', src: 'data:image/svg+xml;utf8,' + encodeURIComponent( '' ) }) })); src.addFeature(labelFeature); var layer = new ol.layer.Vector({ source: src, zIndex: 2 }); advMapInstance.addLayer(layer); advMapLayers.push(layer); // 범례 아이템 var rt2 = getRoute(rid); legendItems.push( '
' + '
' + '' + (rt2.id||rid) + '번' + '' + (rt2.start||'') + '→' + (rt2.end||'') + '' + '' + busCount + '대' + '
' ); }); // 범례 표시 if (legendItems.length) { legendEl.innerHTML = '
진행 노선
' + legendItems.join(''); legendEl.style.display = 'block'; } // 지도 뷰 맞추기 if (allCoords.length) { var extent = ol.extent.createEmpty(); allCoords.forEach(function(c) { ol.extent.extend(extent, [c[0],c[1],c[0],c[1]]); }); advMapInstance.getView().fit(extent, { padding:[60,60,60,60], duration:700 }); } } function closeAdvMap() { currentAdvMapId = null; showPage('advertisers'); } // 공유 링크 생성 function shareAdvMap() { if (!currentAdvMapId) return; var base = window.location.href.split('?')[0].split('#')[0]; var url = base + '?advmap=' + encodeURIComponent(currentAdvMapId); var popup = document.getElementById('advmap-share-popup'); document.getElementById('advmap-share-url').value = url; document.getElementById('advmap-copy-toast').style.display = 'none'; popup.style.display = popup.style.display === 'block' ? 'none' : 'block'; } function copyAdvMapUrl() { var input = document.getElementById('advmap-share-url'); input.select(); try { navigator.clipboard.writeText(input.value).then(function() { document.getElementById('advmap-copy-toast').style.display = 'block'; setTimeout(function(){ document.getElementById('advmap-copy-toast').style.display='none'; }, 2500); }); } catch(e) { document.execCommand('copy'); document.getElementById('advmap-copy-toast').style.display = 'block'; setTimeout(function(){ document.getElementById('advmap-copy-toast').style.display='none'; }, 2500); } } // URL 파라미터로 광고주 지도 직접 접근 (공유 링크) function checkAdvMapParam() { var params = new URLSearchParams(window.location.search); var advId = params.get('advmap'); if (!advId) return; // 공유 링크 접근 → 공유 전용 뷰 활성화 var shareView = document.getElementById('share-view'); if (shareView) { shareView.style.display = 'flex'; // 내부 메뉴·사이드바 완전 차단 (이미 share-view가 위에 덮음) setTimeout(function() { initShareView(advId); }, 350); } } var svMapInstance = null; var svMapLayers = []; function initShareView(advId) { // 데이터가 없으면 잠시 대기 if (!DB.routes || !DB.routes.length) { setTimeout(function(){ initShareView(advId); }, 200); return; } var adv = getAdv(advId); var contracts = activeContracts().filter(function(c){ return c.advId === advId; }); // 광고주 이름 없으면 (잘못된 ID) 안내 if (!adv.name || adv.name === '미상') { document.getElementById('sv-adv-name').textContent = '광고 현황'; document.getElementById('sv-adv-sub').textContent = '유효하지 않은 링크입니다'; return; } // 헤더 세팅 var byRoute = {}; contracts.forEach(function(c) { if (!c.routeId) return; if (!byRoute[c.routeId]) byRoute[c.routeId] = { count:0 }; byRoute[c.routeId].count++; }); var routeIds = Object.keys(byRoute); document.getElementById('sv-adv-name').textContent = adv.name; document.getElementById('sv-adv-sub').textContent = '광고 진행 노선 현황'; document.getElementById('sv-stats').innerHTML = '' + contracts.length + ' 대 집행중 · ' + '' + routeIds.length + ' 개 노선'; var badgesEl = document.getElementById('sv-route-badges'); badgesEl.innerHTML = routeIds.map(function(rid) { var rt = getRoute(rid); var col = rt.type==='급행'?'#E8354A':rt.type==='간선'?'#3A5BF0':'#0DB972'; return '' + (rt.id||rid) + '번'; }).join(''); // 지도 초기화 if (!svMapInstance) { var vkey = '212243F0-4084-334E-A51D-9D67F98759FB'; svMapInstance = new ol.Map({ target: 'sv-map-ol', layers: [new ol.layer.Tile({ source: new ol.source.XYZ({ url: 'https://api.vworld.kr/req/wmts/1.0.0/' + vkey + '/Base/{z}/{y}/{x}.png', crossOrigin: 'anonymous' }) })] }); svMapInstance.getView().setCenter(ol.proj.fromLonLat([127.385, 36.351])); svMapInstance.getView().setZoom(12); svMapInstance.on('pointermove', function(e) { var f = svMapInstance.forEachFeatureAtPixel(e.pixel, function(f){ return f; }, {hitTolerance:6}); svMapInstance.getViewport().style.cursor = (f && f.get('stopName')) ? 'pointer' : ''; }); } // 기존 레이어 제거 svMapLayers.forEach(function(l){ svMapInstance.removeLayer(l); }); svMapLayers = []; var legendEl = document.getElementById('sv-legend'); legendEl.innerHTML = ''; legendEl.style.display = 'none'; var allCoords = []; var legendItems = []; routeIds.forEach(function(rid, i) { var color = ADV_COLORS[i % ADV_COLORS.length]; var routeData = ROUTES.find(function(r){ return r.id === rid; }); var busCount = byRoute[rid].count; if (!routeData || !routeData.stops || routeData.stops.length < 2) return; var src = new ol.source.Vector(); var coords = routeData.stops.map(function(s){ return ol.proj.fromLonLat([s.lng, s.lat]); }); allCoords = allCoords.concat(coords); // 노선 선 var lineF = new ol.Feature({ geometry: new ol.geom.LineString(coords) }); lineF.setStyle(new ol.style.Style({ stroke: new ol.style.Stroke({ color: color, width: 5 }) })); src.addFeature(lineF); // 정류장 점 routeData.stops.forEach(function(s, si) { var isEnd = si === 0 || si === routeData.stops.length - 1; var f = new ol.Feature({ geometry: new ol.geom.Point(ol.proj.fromLonLat([s.lng, s.lat])), stopName: s.name }); f.setStyle(new ol.style.Style({ image: new ol.style.Circle({ radius: isEnd ? 7 : 3, fill: new ol.style.Fill({ color: isEnd ? '#fff' : color }), stroke: new ol.style.Stroke({ color: isEnd ? color : '#fff', width: isEnd ? 2.5 : 1 }) }) })); src.addFeature(f); }); // 버스 수 라벨 박스 var midStop = routeData.stops[Math.floor(routeData.stops.length / 2)]; var rt2 = getRoute(rid); var lblF = new ol.Feature({ geometry: new ol.geom.Point(ol.proj.fromLonLat([midStop.lng, midStop.lat])) }); lblF.setStyle(new ol.style.Style({ image: new ol.style.Icon({ anchor: [0.5, 1.6], anchorXUnits: 'fraction', anchorYUnits: 'fraction', src: 'data:image/svg+xml;utf8,' + encodeURIComponent( '' ) }) })); src.addFeature(lblF); var layer = new ol.layer.Vector({ source: src, zIndex: 2 }); svMapInstance.addLayer(layer); svMapLayers.push(layer); legendItems.push( '
' + '
' + '' + (rt2.id||rid) + '번' + '' + (rt2.start||'') + '→' + (rt2.end||'') + '' + '' + busCount + '대' + '
' ); }); if (legendItems.length) { legendEl.innerHTML = '
진행 노선
' + legendItems.join(''); legendEl.style.display = 'block'; } if (allCoords.length) { var extent = ol.extent.createEmpty(); allCoords.forEach(function(c){ ol.extent.extend(extent, [c[0],c[1],c[0],c[1]]); }); svMapInstance.getView().fit(extent, { padding:[60,60,60,60], duration:700 }); } setTimeout(function(){ svMapInstance.updateSize(); }, 150); } // 초기화 DB.contracts = []; DB.advertisers = []; loadGsConfig(); // URL 파라미터 체크 checkAdvMapParam(); // ============================================================ // 진행중 광고 모달 // ============================================================ let activeModalOpen = false; function openActiveModal() { document.getElementById('active-modal-overlay').style.display = 'flex'; document.getElementById('active-search').value = ''; renderActiveTable(); setTimeout(() => document.getElementById('active-search').focus(), 100); } function closeActiveModal(e) { if (!e || e.target === document.getElementById('active-modal-overlay')) document.getElementById('active-modal-overlay').style.display = 'none'; } function renderActiveTable() { const q = (document.getElementById('active-search')?.value || '').trim().toLowerCase(); const tbody = document.getElementById('active-table-body'); const countEl = document.getElementById('active-result-count'); let list = activeContracts(); if (q) { list = list.filter(c => { const adv = getAdv(c.advId); const rt = getRoute(c.routeId); return c.plate.toLowerCase().includes(q) || rt.id?.toLowerCase().includes(q) || rt.id?.toLowerCase().includes(q) || adv.name.toLowerCase().includes(q) || c.product.toLowerCase().includes(q) || rt.start?.toLowerCase().includes(q) || rt.end?.toLowerCase().includes(q); }); } list = list.sort((a,b) => a.end.localeCompare(b.end)); countEl.textContent = `${list.length}건`; if (!list.length) { tbody.innerHTML = '검색 결과 없음'; return; } tbody.innerHTML = list.map(c => { const adv = getAdv(c.advId); const rt = getRoute(c.routeId); const dl = getDaysLeft(c.end); const tb = rt.type==='급행'?'badge-red':rt.type==='간선'?'badge-blue':'badge-green'; const dc = dl<=7?'badge-red':dl<=30?'badge-orange':'badge-green'; return ` ${c.plate} ${rt.id}번 ${rt.type} ${adv.name} ${c.product} ${fmtDate(c.start)} ${fmtDate(c.end)} D-${dl} `; }).join(''); } // ============================================================ // 만료임박 모달 // ============================================================ let currentExpFilter = 30; function openExpiringModal(days) { currentExpFilter = days; document.getElementById('expiring-modal-overlay').style.display = 'flex'; updateExpFilterBtns(); renderExpiringTable(); } function closeExpiringModal(e) { if (!e || e.target === document.getElementById('expiring-modal-overlay')) document.getElementById('expiring-modal-overlay').style.display = 'none'; } function setExpFilter(days) { currentExpFilter = days; updateExpFilterBtns(); renderExpiringTable(); } function updateExpFilterBtns() { [7,15,30,60].forEach(d => { const btn = document.getElementById(`exp-btn-${d}`); if (btn) { btn.className = d === currentExpFilter ? 'btn btn-primary' : 'btn btn-ghost'; } }); } function renderExpiringTable() { const list = activeContracts() .map(c => ({...c, daysLeft: getDaysLeft(c.end)})) .filter(c => c.daysLeft >= 0 && c.daysLeft <= currentExpFilter) .sort((a,b) => a.daysLeft - b.daysLeft); document.getElementById('exp-result-count').textContent = `${list.length}건`; const tbody = document.getElementById('expiring-table-body'); if (!list.length) { tbody.innerHTML = `D-${currentExpFilter} 내 만료 계약 없음`; return; } tbody.innerHTML = list.map(c => { const adv = getAdv(c.advId); const rt = getRoute(c.routeId); const cls = c.daysLeft<=7?'dday-critical':c.daysLeft<=15?'dday-warning':'dday-safe'; const tb = rt.type==='급행'?'badge-red':rt.type==='간선'?'badge-blue':'badge-green'; return `
D-${c.daysLeft}
${c.plate} ${rt.id}번 ${adv.name} ${c.product} ${fmtDate(c.end)} `; }).join(''); } // ============================================================ // 가용 버스 모달 // ============================================================ let freeTypeFilter = 'all'; function openFreeModal() { freeTypeFilter = 'all'; document.getElementById('free-modal-overlay').style.display = 'flex'; document.getElementById('free-search').value = ''; updateFreeTypeBtns(); renderFreeList(); } function closeFreeModal(e) { if (!e || e.target === document.getElementById('free-modal-overlay')) document.getElementById('free-modal-overlay').style.display = 'none'; } function setFreeType(type) { freeTypeFilter = type; updateFreeTypeBtns(); renderFreeList(); } function updateFreeTypeBtns() { ['all','급행','간선','지선'].forEach(t => { const btn = document.getElementById(`free-type-${t}`); if (!btn) return; const isActive = t === freeTypeFilter; if (isActive) { btn.style.border = '2px solid #fff'; btn.style.fontWeight = '800'; } else { btn.style.border = '1px solid var(--border2)'; btn.style.fontWeight = '600'; } }); } function renderFreeList() { const q = (document.getElementById('free-search')?.value || '').trim(); const activeMap = {}; activeContracts().forEach(c => { if (!activeMap[c.routeId]) activeMap[c.routeId] = 0; activeMap[c.routeId]++; }); let routesFiltered = DB.routes.filter(r => { const free = r.buses - (activeMap[r.id] || 0); if (free <= 0) return false; if (freeTypeFilter !== 'all' && r.type !== freeTypeFilter) return false; if (q && !r.id.includes(q) && !r.start.includes(q) && !r.end.includes(q)) return false; return true; }).sort((a,b) => { const fa = a.buses - (activeMap[a.id]||0); const fb = b.buses - (activeMap[b.id]||0); return fb - fa; }); const totalFree = routesFiltered.reduce((s,r) => s + r.buses - (activeMap[r.id]||0), 0); document.getElementById('free-result-count').textContent = `${routesFiltered.length}개 노선 · 총 ${totalFree}대 가용`; const el = document.getElementById('free-route-list'); if (!routesFiltered.length) { el.innerHTML = '
✅
조건에 맞는 가용 버스 없음
'; return; } el.innerHTML = routesFiltered.map(r => { const used = activeMap[r.id] || 0; const free = r.buses - used; const pct = Math.round(used / r.buses * 100); const tb = r.type==='급행'?'badge-red':r.type==='간선'?'badge-blue':'badge-green'; const barC = pct>=90?'var(--red)':pct>=70?'var(--orange)':'var(--accent)'; // 가용 차량번호 (데모용: 번호판 없이 슬롯 표시) const slots = Array.from({length: free}, (_,i) => `가용${i+1}` ).join(''); return `
${r.id}번 ${r.start} → ${r.end} (${r.type})
${free} /${r.buses}대 가용
${pct}%점유
${slots}
`; }).join(''); } // 만료임박 대시보드 카드 클릭 처리 document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', () => {}); // ============================================================ // 계약 등록/수정 폼 // ============================================================ let cfRouteCounter = 0; // ── 광고주 자동완성 ────────────────────────────────────────── function filterAdvDropdown(q) { const dd = document.getElementById('cf-adv-dropdown'); q = (q||'').trim(); const matches = DB.advertisers.filter(a => !q || a.name.includes(q) || a.contact?.includes(q)); if (!matches.length && !q) { dd.classList.remove('open'); return; } let html = ''; if (matches.length) { html = matches.map(a => `
${a.name}${a.contact||''}
` ).join(''); } if (q && !matches.find(a=>a.name===q)) { html += `
＋ 신규 광고주: ${q}
`; } dd.innerHTML = html || '
검색 결과 없음
'; dd.classList.add('open'); } function selectAdv(id, name) { document.getElementById('cf-adv-id').value = id; document.getElementById('cf-adv-input').value = name; document.getElementById('cf-adv-dropdown').classList.remove('open'); } function closeAdvDropdown() { document.getElementById('cf-adv-dropdown')?.classList.remove('open'); } // ── 노선 행 추가 ───────────────────────────────────────────── function addRouteRow(routeId, qty, plates) { const idx = ++cfRouteCounter; const container = document.getElementById('cf-routes-container'); const div = document.createElement('div'); div.className = 'route-row'; div.dataset.rowIdx = idx; div.innerHTML = `
노선 ${idx}
버스 대
`; container.appendChild(div); // 초기값 복원 if (routeId) { const r = DB.routes.find(x=>x.id===routeId); if (r) { div.querySelector('.rr-route-input').value = `${r.id}번 · ${r.start}→${r.end}`; div.querySelector('.rr-route-id').value = r.id; } } const qtyVal = qty || 1; div.querySelector('.rr-qty-input').value = qtyVal; syncPlateGrid(div, plates || []); div.querySelector('.rr-route-input').addEventListener('change', updateSummary); return div; } // ── 노선 드롭다운 ──────────────────────────────────────────── function filterRouteDropdown(input) { const q = (input.value||'').trim().toLowerCase(); const dd = input.nextElementSibling; const matches = DB.routes.filter(r => !q || r.id.toLowerCase().includes(q) || r.start.includes(q) || r.end.includes(q) || r.type.includes(q) ).slice(0, 40); if (!matches.length) { dd.innerHTML = '
노선 없음
'; dd.classList.add('open'); return; } dd.innerHTML = matches.map((r,i) => { const bc = r.type==='급행'?'rr-badge-급행':r.type==='간선'?'rr-badge-간선':'rr-badge-지선'; return `
${r.type} ${r.id}번 ${r.start} → ${r.end} · ${r.buses}대
`; }).join(''); dd.classList.add('open'); } function selectRoute(row, routeId) { const r = DB.routes.find(x=>x.id===routeId); if (!r) return; row.querySelector('.rr-route-input').value = `${r.id}번 · ${r.start} → ${r.end}`; row.querySelector('.rr-route-id').value = r.id; row.querySelector('.rr-route-dropdown').classList.remove('open'); syncPlateGrid(row); updateSummary(); row.querySelector('.rr-qty-input').focus(); } function routeDropdownKey(e, input) { const dd = input.nextElementSibling; const items = dd.querySelectorAll('.rr-route-dropdown-item'); let cur = [...items].findIndex(i=>i.classList.contains('selected')); if (e.key==='ArrowDown') { e.preventDefault(); cur=Math.min(cur+1,items.length-1); } else if (e.key==='ArrowUp') { e.preventDefault(); cur=Math.max(cur-1,0); } else if (e.key==='Enter' && cur>=0) { e.preventDefault(); items[cur].dispatchEvent(new MouseEvent('mousedown')); return; } else if (e.key==='Escape') { dd.classList.remove('open'); return; } items.forEach((it,i)=>it.classList.toggle('selected',i===cur)); if (items[cur]) items[cur].scrollIntoView({block:'nearest'}); } // ── 번호판 그리드 동기화 ───────────────────────────────────── function syncPlateGrid(row, existingPlates) { const qty = parseInt(row.querySelector('.rr-qty-input').value) || 1; const grid = row.querySelector('.plate-grid'); const cols = qty <= 2 ? 1 : qty <= 6 ? 2 : 3; grid.style.gridTemplateColumns = `repeat(${cols},1fr)`; // 기존 입력값 보존 const oldVals = existingPlates ? existingPlates : [...grid.querySelectorAll('.plate-cell-input')].map(i=>i.value.trim()); grid.innerHTML = ''; for (let i = 0; i < qty; i++) { const cell = document.createElement('div'); cell.className = 'plate-cell'; cell.innerHTML = ` ${i+1} `; grid.appendChild(cell); } updateSummary(); } // ── 요약 ───────────────────────────────────────────────────── function updateSummary() { const rows = document.querySelectorAll('.route-row'); let totalBuses = 0, routeCount = 0; const lines = []; rows.forEach(row => { const routeId = row.querySelector('.rr-route-id').value; if (!routeId) return; const plates = [...row.querySelectorAll('.plate-cell-input')] .map(i=>i.value.trim()).filter(Boolean); const qty = parseInt(row.querySelector('.rr-qty-input').value)||0; const rt = DB.routes.find(r=>r.id===routeId)||{}; routeCount++; totalBuses += qty; const filled = plates.length; const missing = qty - filled; lines.push(`${rt.id||routeId}번 · ${qty}대 (번호판 ${filled}개 입력${missing>0?' · '+missing+'개 미입력':''})`); }); const sumEl = document.getElementById('cf-summary'); if (routeCount > 0) { sumEl.style.display = 'block'; sumEl.innerHTML = `📋 ${routeCount}개 노선 · 총 ${totalBuses}대
` + lines.join('
'); } else { sumEl.style.display = 'none'; } } // ── 폼 열기/닫기 ───────────────────────────────────────────── function openContractForm(contractId, prefillAdvId, prefillPlates) { const overlay = document.getElementById('contract-form-overlay'); overlay.style.display = 'flex'; cfRouteCounter = 0; document.getElementById('cf-routes-container').innerHTML = ''; document.getElementById('cf-summary').style.display = 'none'; if (contractId) { // 수정 모드 const c = DB.contracts.find(x => x.id === contractId); if (!c) return; const adv = getAdv(c.advId); document.getElementById('cf-title').textContent = '계약 수정'; document.getElementById('cf-sub').textContent = `ID: ${c.id} · ${c.plate}`; document.getElementById('cf-id').value = c.id; document.getElementById('cf-adv-id').value = c.advId; document.getElementById('cf-adv-input').value = adv.name; document.getElementById('cf-product').value = c.product || ''; document.getElementById('cf-status').value = c.status || '진행중'; document.getElementById('cf-start').value = c.start || ''; document.getElementById('cf-end').value = c.end || ''; document.getElementById('cf-memo').value = c.memo || ''; document.getElementById('cf-submit-btn').textContent = '💾 수정 저장'; addRouteRow(c.routeId, 1, [c.plate]); } else { // 등록 모드 document.getElementById('cf-title').textContent = '계약 등록'; document.getElementById('cf-sub').textContent = '새 광고 계약을 등록합니다'; document.getElementById('cf-id').value = ''; document.getElementById('cf-adv-id').value = ''; document.getElementById('cf-adv-input').value = ''; document.getElementById('cf-product').value = ''; document.getElementById('cf-status').value = '진행중'; document.getElementById('cf-start').value = new Date().toISOString().slice(0,10); document.getElementById('cf-end').value = ''; document.getElementById('cf-memo').value = ''; document.getElementById('cf-submit-btn').textContent = '💾 계약 저장'; addRouteRow(); // 광고주 프리필 (계약 추가 버튼에서 호출 시) if (prefillAdvId) { const adv = DB.advertisers.find(a=>a.id===prefillAdvId); if (adv) { document.getElementById('cf-adv-id').value = adv.id; document.getElementById('cf-adv-input').value = adv.name; } } } setTimeout(() => document.getElementById('cf-adv-input').focus(), 120); } function closeContractForm(e) { if (!e || e.target === document.getElementById('contract-form-overlay')) document.getElementById('contract-form-overlay').style.display = 'none'; } // ── 저장 ───────────────────────────────────────────────────── function submitContractForm() { const advInput = document.getElementById('cf-adv-input').value.trim(); let advId = document.getElementById('cf-adv-id').value; const product = document.getElementById('cf-product').value; const start = document.getElementById('cf-start').value; const end = document.getElementById('cf-end').value; const status = document.getElementById('cf-status').value; const memo = document.getElementById('cf-memo').value.trim(); const editId = document.getElementById('cf-id').value; if (!advInput) { alert('광고주를 입력해주세요.'); document.getElementById('cf-adv-input').focus(); return; } if (!product) { alert('광고 종류를 선택해주세요.'); document.getElementById('cf-product').focus(); return; } if (!start) { alert('시작일을 입력해주세요.'); return; } if (!end) { alert('종료일을 입력해주세요.'); return; } if (start > end) { alert('종료일은 시작일 이후여야 합니다.'); return; } // 신규 광고주 처리 if (!advId || advId === '__new__') { const existing = DB.advertisers.find(a => a.name === advInput); if (existing) { advId = existing.id; } else { advId = 'adv_' + Date.now(); DB.advertisers.push({ id: advId, name: advInput, contact: '', memo: '' }); } } // 노선/번호판 수집 const rows = document.querySelectorAll('.route-row'); const entries = []; let hasRoute = false; rows.forEach(row => { const routeId = row.querySelector('.rr-route-id').value; if (!routeId) return; hasRoute = true; const qty = parseInt(row.querySelector('.rr-qty-input').value) || 1; const plates = [...row.querySelectorAll('.plate-cell-input')].map(i => i.value.trim()); for (let i = 0; i < qty; i++) { entries.push({ routeId, plate: plates[i] || `(${routeId}번 ${i+1}호)` }); } }); if (!hasRoute) { alert('노선을 최소 1개 추가해주세요.'); return; } const newId = () => 'c' + Date.now() + Math.floor(Math.random()*10000); var batchIds = (document.getElementById('cf-batch-ids').value || '').split(',').filter(Boolean); if (editId) { // 단건 수정 var idx = DB.contracts.findIndex(function(c){ return c.id === editId; }); if (idx !== -1) { var first = entries[0] || {}; DB.contracts[idx] = Object.assign({}, DB.contracts[idx], { advId: advId, product: product, start: start, end: end, status: status, memo: memo, routeId: first.routeId || DB.contracts[idx].routeId, plate: first.plate || DB.contracts[idx].plate }); } } else if (batchIds.length > 0) { // 배치 수정: 같은 수의 entries로 1:1 매핑, 초과분은 신규 추가, 부족분은 삭제 var i = 0; // 기존 계약 업데이트 batchIds.forEach(function(bid) { var cidx = DB.contracts.findIndex(function(c){ return c.id === bid; }); if (cidx === -1) return; var entry = entries[i] || entries[entries.length-1] || {}; DB.contracts[cidx] = Object.assign({}, DB.contracts[cidx], { advId: advId, product: product, start: start, end: end, status: status, memo: memo, routeId: entry.routeId || DB.contracts[cidx].routeId, plate: entry.plate || DB.contracts[cidx].plate }); i++; }); // 새로 추가된 버스 (entries가 더 많은 경우) for (; i < entries.length; i++) { DB.contracts.push({ id: newId(), advId: advId, routeId: entries[i].routeId, plate: entries[i].plate, product: product, start: start, end: end, status: status, memo: memo }); } // 줄어든 버스 (entries가 더 적은 경우) → 초과 계약 삭제 if (entries.length < batchIds.length) { var removeIds = batchIds.slice(entries.length); DB.contracts = DB.contracts.filter(function(c){ return !removeIds.includes(c.id); }); } } else { // 신규 등록 entries.forEach(function(entry) { DB.contracts.push({ id: newId(), advId: advId, routeId: entry.routeId, plate: entry.plate, product: product, start: start, end: end, status: status, memo: memo }); }); } closeContractForm(); refreshAll(); var toastMsg = editId ? '계약이 수정되었습니다.' : batchIds.length > 0 ? (batchIds.length + '건 일괄 수정 완료') : ('계약 ' + entries.length + '건이 등록되었습니다.'); showToast(toastMsg, 'green'); // 구글 시트 저장 var newOrUpdated = DB.contracts.filter(function(c) { return entries.some(function(e){ return e.plate === c.plate && e.routeId === c.routeId; }) || c.id === editId || batchIds.includes(c.id); }); if (newOrUpdated.length === 1) { gsSave('saveContract', newOrUpdated[0]); } else if (newOrUpdated.length > 1) { gsSave('batchSave', newOrUpdated); } // 광고주 신규인 경우 저장 var advObj = DB.advertisers.find(function(a){ return a.id === advId; }); if (advObj) gsSave('saveAdvertiser', advObj); } // ── 삭제 ───────────────────────────────────────────────────── function deleteContract(contractId) { const c = DB.contracts.find(x => x.id === contractId); if (!c) return; const adv = getAdv(c.advId); const rt = getRoute(c.routeId); if (!confirm(`[${adv.name}] ${rt.id||''}번 · ${c.plate}\n이 계약을 삭제하시겠습니까?`)) return; DB.contracts = DB.contracts.filter(x => x.id !== contractId); refreshAll(); showToast('계약이 삭제되었습니다.', 'red'); } // ── 토스트 ─────────────────────────────────────────────────── function showToast(msg, type) { const colors = { green:'var(--green)', red:'var(--red)', blue:'var(--accent)' }; const t = document.createElement('div'); t.style.cssText = `position:fixed;bottom:24px;right:24px;z-index:9999;padding:12px 18px; border-radius:10px;background:var(--bg2);border:1px solid var(--border);box-shadow:var(--shadow-lg); font-size:13px;font-weight:600;color:var(--text);display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px; animation:fadeUp .3s ease;`; const dot = document.createElement('span'); dot.style.cssText = `width:8px;height:8px;border-radius:50%;background:${colors[type]||colors.green};flex-shrink:0;`; t.appendChild(dot); t.appendChild(document.createTextNode(msg)); document.body.appendChild(t); setTimeout(() => { t.style.opacity='0'; t.style.transition='opacity .3s'; setTimeout(()=>t.remove(),300); }, 2800); } // ============================================================ // 종료 광고 페이지 // ============================================================ function getArchivedContracts() { const today = new Date(); today.setHours(0,0,0,0); const cutoffArc = new Date(today); cutoffArc.setDate(cutoffArc.getDate() - 10); return DB.contracts.filter(c => { const end = new Date(c.end); end.setHours(0,0,0,0); // 만료 후 10일 이상 지난 것 + status=종료 명시된 것 return end <= cutoffArc || c.status === '종료'; }); } function renderArchived() { const archived = getArchivedContracts(); const yearSel = document.getElementById('arc-year'); const sortSel = document.getElementById('arc-sort'); const searchVal = (document.getElementById('arc-search')?.value || '').trim().toLowerCase(); const selYear = yearSel?.value || 'all'; const selSort = sortSel?.value || 'end-desc'; // 연도 옵션 채우기 (첫 진입 시) if (yearSel && yearSel.options.length <= 1) { const years = [...new Set(archived.map(c => c.end?.slice(0,4)).filter(Boolean))].sort().reverse(); years.forEach(y => { const opt = document.createElement('option'); opt.value = y; opt.textContent = y + '년'; yearSel.appendChild(opt); }); } // 연도 필터 let filtered = archived; if (selYear !== 'all') { filtered = filtered.filter(c => c.end?.startsWith(selYear)); } // 광고주별 집계 const advMap = {}; filtered.forEach(c => { const adv = getAdv(c.advId); if (!advMap[c.advId]) { advMap[c.advId] = { advId: c.advId, name: adv.name, contact: adv.contact || '', contracts: [], routes: new Set(), lastEnd: '', firstStart: '9999-99-99', }; } const g = advMap[c.advId]; g.contracts.push(c); if (c.routeId) g.routes.add(c.routeId); if (c.end > g.lastEnd) g.lastEnd = c.end; if (c.start < g.firstStart) g.firstStart = c.start; }); let groups = Object.values(advMap); // 검색 if (searchVal) { groups = groups.filter(g => g.name.toLowerCase().includes(searchVal)); } // 정렬 groups.sort((a, b) => { if (selSort === 'end-desc') return b.lastEnd.localeCompare(a.lastEnd); if (selSort === 'end-asc') return a.lastEnd.localeCompare(b.lastEnd); if (selSort === 'buses-desc') return b.contracts.length - a.contracts.length; if (selSort === 'adv-name') return a.name.localeCompare(b.name, 'ko'); return 0; }); // KPI 요약 const kpiEl = document.getElementById('arc-kpi-row'); if (kpiEl) { const totalContracts = filtered.length; const totalAdvs = groups.length; const totalRoutes = new Set(filtered.map(c=>c.routeId).filter(Boolean)).size; const recentMonth = filtered.filter(c => { const d = new Date(c.end); const n = new Date(); return d.getFullYear()===n.getFullYear() && d.getMonth()===n.getMonth(); }).length; kpiEl.innerHTML = [ { label:'종료 계약', value: totalContracts, unit:'건', color:'blue' }, { label:'광고주 수', value: totalAdvs, unit:'개', color:'green' }, { label:'이용 노선', value: totalRoutes, unit:'개', color:'orange'}, { label:'이번달 종료',value: recentMonth, unit:'건', color:'red' }, ].map(k => `
${k.label}
${k.value}${k.unit}
`).join(''); } // 결과 카운트 const countEl = document.getElementById('arc-count'); if (countEl) countEl.textContent = `${groups.length}개 광고주 · ${filtered.length}건`; // 광고주별 카드 렌더 const listEl = document.getElementById('arc-list'); if (!groups.length) { listEl.innerHTML = `
🗂️
종료된 광고가 없습니다
`; return; } listEl.innerHTML = groups.map(g => { // 노선별 집계 const byRoute = {}; g.contracts.forEach(c => { if (!byRoute[c.routeId]) byRoute[c.routeId] = { routeId:c.routeId, contracts:[] }; byRoute[c.routeId].contracts.push(c); }); const routeEntries = Object.values(byRoute).sort((a,b)=>b.contracts.length-a.contracts.length); // 기간 범위 const periodStr = g.firstStart !== '9999-99-99' ? `${fmtDate(g.firstStart)} ~ ${fmtDate(g.lastEnd)}` : '—'; // 가장 많이 쓴 광고물 const productCnt = {}; g.contracts.forEach(c => { productCnt[c.product] = (productCnt[c.product]||0)+1; }); const topProduct = Object.entries(productCnt).sort((a,b)=>b[1]-a[1])[0]?.[0] || '—'; return `
${g.name}
${g.contracts.length}
총 버스
${g.routes.size}
노선 수
${fmtDate(g.lastEnd)}
최종 종료
${topProduct}
주요 광고물
▾
📅 광고 기간: ${periodStr} 🗂️ 계약 건수: ${g.contracts.length}건 🚌 이용 노선: ${g.routes.size}개
${routeEntries.map(re => { const rt = getRoute(re.routeId); const tb = rt.type==='급행'?'badge-red':rt.type==='간선'?'badge-blue':'badge-green'; // 계약들을 날짜별로 그룹 (같은 기간끼리) const periodGroups = {}; re.contracts.forEach(c => { const key = c.start+'|'+c.end+'|'+c.product; if (!periodGroups[key]) periodGroups[key] = { start:c.start, end:c.end, product:c.product, plates:[] }; periodGroups[key].plates.push(c.plate); }); return Object.values(periodGroups).sort((a,b)=>b.end.localeCompare(a.end)).map((pg,pi) => ` ${pi===0 ? `` : ''} `).join(''); }).join('')}
노선종류구간버스 수번호판 시작일종료일광고물
${rt.id||'—'}번 ${rt.type||'—'} ${rt.id?(rt.start+'→'+rt.end):'—'}${pg.plates.length}대 ${pg.plates.slice(0,6).join(', ')}${pg.plates.length>6?` 외 ${pg.plates.length-6}대`:''} ${fmtDate(pg.start)} ${fmtDate(pg.end)} ${pg.product}
`; }).join(''); } function toggleArcDetail(id, header) { const el = document.getElementById(id); if (!el) return; const open = el.style.display === 'block'; el.style.display = open ? 'none' : 'block'; const chevron = header.querySelector('.arc-chevron'); if (chevron) chevron.textContent = open ? '▾' : '▴'; } // 번호판 인라인 수정 (더블클릭) function editPlateInline(event, contractId) { const box = event.currentTarget; if (box.classList.contains('editing')) return; box.classList.add('editing'); const plateSpan = box.querySelector('.ptb-plate'); const curVal = plateSpan.textContent; const input = document.createElement('input'); input.type = 'text'; input.value = curVal === '(미입력)' ? '' : curVal; input.className = 'ptb-edit-input'; input.placeholder = '번호판 입력'; plateSpan.replaceWith(input); input.focus(); input.select(); const commit = () => { const newPlate = input.value.trim() || curVal; const c = DB.contracts.find(x => x.id === contractId); if (c) c.plate = newPlate; const span = document.createElement('span'); span.className = 'ptb-plate'; span.textContent = newPlate; input.replaceWith(span); box.classList.remove('editing'); renderContractTable(); }; input.addEventListener('blur', commit); input.addEventListener('keydown', e => { if (e.key === 'Enter') { e.preventDefault(); commit(); } if (e.key === 'Escape') { input.value = curVal; commit(); } }); } // 번호판 삭제 확인 팝업 function confirmDeleteContract(contractId, plate) { const msg = `차량 번호판 [${plate}] 계약을 삭제하시겠습니까?`; if (!confirm(msg)) return; DB.contracts = DB.contracts.filter(c => c.id !== contractId); refreshAll(); showToast(`${plate} 계약이 삭제되었습니다.`, 'red'); }
